title: Vanish Spray Pet Expert Oxi Action Stain Remover, 500ml - Fresh Scent, Carpet Cleaner
features: For an easy and effective way of removing pet stains from your carpets & upholstery
Can be used in a variety of pet stains such as: urine, vomit, faeces, mud marks
Neutralise the odours your pets leave behind, keeping your carpets smelling fresh
Specifically designed formula that cleans up after your little friends whilst also helping to prevent remarking in the future
description: Product Description Vanish Carpet Cleaner + Upholstery Pet Expert Stain Remover Spray is specially designed to cleans pet messes 1st time. Whatever messes & stains your pet makes, you can be sure Vanish Pet Expert can remove it. The specially designed stain removal formula gets deep into the fibres of your carpet & soft furnishings to tackle stains in just 30 seconds. From pet stains, like vomit & mud marks to tackling urine odours, as well as general household stains, you can enjoy pet stain free carpets in no time. The Pet Expert formula also helps to prevent remarking. For the best result use Vanish Pet Expert Stain Remover Spray in combination with our Foam Shampoo or Powder for amazing cleaning results. The product does not pose any unreasonable risk of adverse effects to pets when used in accordance with label instructions. Ingredients (For Ingredients Information: Www.rbeuroinfo.com): Contains: <5% Oxygen-based Bleaching Agent, Anionic Surfactants, Nonionic Surfactants, Polycarboxylates, Perfume, Limonene. Directions For the best result use Vanish Pet Expert Stain Remover Spray in combination with our Foam Shampoo or Powder for amazing cleaning results. Safety Warning Keep away from children and pets. Do not get in eyes. If product gets into eyes, rinse with plenty of water. Do not ingest. If swallowed get medical attention. Do not breath spray. Wash hands after use. If in contact with skin whitening may occur, do not be alarmed. The whitening effect is temporary and reversible. In case of splashing, rinse immediately with plenty of water. For sensitive skin the use of gloves is recommended. Do not mix with other products. Use in well ventilated areas also while vacuuming. Keep children and pets off area while in use and vacuuming. See more
